# KingBet Exchange

> Smart, secure, AI-driven crypto investment platform offering up to 5% monthly returns, fortnightly payouts, instant withdrawals and lifetime referral earnings.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of KingBet Exchange, returns, security and supported assets.
- [About](/about): Who we are and how the platform works.
- [Plans](/plans): Investment plans and pricing tiers.
- [Referral](/referral): Lifetime referral commission program.
- [Blog](/blog): Guides on crypto investing, wallet security and payouts.

## Legal

- [Terms of Service](/terms): Platform terms and conditions.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle your data.
- [AML & KYC Policy](/aml): Identity verification and compliance.
- [Risk Disclosure](/risk): Investment risks to understand.
